spec_match.rationale: Excellent demonstration of DOM parsing behavior. Accurately captures ProcessingInstruction nodes (nodeType 7) and displays their target/data structures.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive playground: processes text updates in real-time, highlights parsed nodes with tags, renders complete recursive DOM trees, and offers click-to-load presets.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the parent index.html blurb about the live HTML editor.

edge_cases.rationale: The custom escapeHtml function on line 214 fails to escape double and single quotes. This directly violates the repository's hard rule: 'escapeHTML must escape &, <, >, ", and '. Attribute escaping regressions have caused real DOM injection bugs.'

references.rationale: The page lacks a 'see also' references links list and does not cite the mandatory external ChromeStatus link.

design_system.rationale: Consistent design: uses neat grids, ivory input cards, green labels, and ivory code blocks.

openQuestions.title: Fix escapeHtml to escape quotes
openQuestions.detail: The custom escapeHtml function on line 214 only replaces '&', '<', and '>'. Update it to escape double quotes '"' (to ") and single quotes '\'' (to ') to follow the repository's mandatory security rules.

openQuestions.title: Add see also references block with ChromeStatus link
openQuestions.detail: Add a references section at the bottom of the page containing the official ChromeStatus link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6534495085920256 to satisfy showcase rules.
